title: dryopteris noveboracensis f. fragrans
intro: Dryopteris noveboracensis f. fragrans, commonly known as the New York fern, is a plant species with fragrant fronds that is native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris noveboracensis f. fragrans include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant's fronds can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
